basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Junior Research Fellow, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (Medical) / Project Technical Support III
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Junior Research Fellow (Medical) / Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow (Medical) / Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years relaxation as applicable

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate (MSc, M Pharm, MD/MS, BMLT)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (Medical): Post graduate (MSc, M Pharm, MD/MS in Ayurveda, Unani, Homeopathy) with previous experience in research projects, expert in field related techniques, proficiency in data management and skills in documentation. Project Technical Support III: 12th in science + BMLT + 5 yrs experience in relevant subject/field

salary_details.salary_range: As per Ministry of AYUSH norms
salary_details.details: As per Ministry of AYUSH norms

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow (Medical) / Project Technical Support III posts at AIIMS Delhi is scheduled for 13 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi has released a total of 2 vacancies for the positions of Junior Research Fellow (Medical) and Project Technical Support III.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow (Medical) post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow (Medical) post, candidates need a postgraduate degree (MSc, M Pharm, MD/MS in Ayurveda, Unani, Homeopathy) with prior research experience and proficiency in relevant techniques and documentation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Junior Research Fellow (Medical) and Project Technical Support III posts is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary for these positions will be as per the norms set by the Ministry of AYUSH.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for these positions?
faq.answer: These positions are filled through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview at the specified venue with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the AIIMS Delhi office, located at New Delhi, pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.
